description_long: This is a vintage medal-style pendant featuring a circular bronze medallion suspended from a white ribbon with black and gold trim. The medallion is topped with an ornate crown motif, and the front side displays intricate engravings, including a central monogram and surrounding text. The reverse side of the medallion shows a relief of a mounted figure, likely a historical or commemorative scene, with additional text on a horizontal bar above the ribbon. The ribbon is pleated and attached to the medallion with a decorative metal clasp, giving the piece a formal and ceremonial appearance. The metal components have a patinated finish, suggesting age and historical significance. The overall design is elaborate, with detailed metalwork and a regal aesthetic.
description: A vintage bronze medallion pendant with an ornate crown, suspended from a pleated white ribbon with black and gold trim, featuring intricate engravings and a ceremonial design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular medallion with a crown motif and detailed engravings, suspended from a pleated white ribbon.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thickness of the medallion and the layered structure of the ribbon, highlighting the three-dimensional relief.
description_view_2: Back view displays a relief of a mounted figure and a horizontal bar with engraved text above the ribbon.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the curvature of the ribbon and the profile of the medallion, emphasizing the depth of the metalwork.
